heading: Grievances concerning former members or their survivors
label: 4132 Grievances concerning former members or their survivors
text: Within the time limitations of , a former member of the Service or the surviving spouse (or, if none, another member of the family) of a deceased member or former member of the Service may file a grievance under this subchapter only with respect to allegations described in .section 4134 of this titlesection 4131(a)(1)(G) of this title
